title: Cash-Constrained Survival
rawSituation: We have 6 weeks of cash runway. We have cut all non-essential costs. We are in late-stage discussions with two investors but neither has committed. A major customer has delayed payment by 60 days. The CEO is considering using personal credit cards to meet payroll. The company has no debt facility.

kernelResult.situationSummary: This is a financial or capital commitment decision. Financial constraint present.
kernelResult.kernelInterpretation: The system interprets this situation as a financial or capital decision where cash, funding, or balance sheet capacity constrains the feasible set. Dimensions surfaced: constraint.

alternativeClasses.reason: Timing pressure suggests operational execution dimension

evidenceState.label: Constraint: Cash position constrains available options
Failure Mode: Liquidity concern — cash position may constrain options
evidenceState.summary: Liquidity concern — cash position may constrain options

evidenceState.label: Evidence Gap: Low documentation
evidenceState.summary: Situation relies primarily on user-reported information without independent documentation

evidenceState.label: Contradiction: Cash runway is critically short but required funding has not
evidenceState.summary: Cash runway is critically short but required funding has not been secured or is delayed

adversarialChallenges.contradiction: Cash runway is critically short but required funding has not been secured or is delayed
adversarialChallenges.outputEffect: Output blocked until contradiction is resolved by human review.

loadBearingAssumptions.ifWrong: The minimum viable path may change.

classificationConfidence.implication: If classification is wrong, the entire lens selection and output structure changes.

informationGaps.impact: Cannot determine who holds decision mandate
informationGaps.acquisitionPath: Ask: Who has the formal authority to make this decision?

informationGaps.impact: Cannot determine what must be performed
informationGaps.acquisitionPath: Ask: What contractual, regulatory, or fiduciary obligations apply?

kernelLimitations: This analysis is based on the information provided and available evidence.
The system cannot verify independently reported facts.
Human review is recommended for high-consequence decisions.
This does not constitute legal, tax, or regulated professional advice.

output.whatThisMeans: The system has identified that this situation touches on regulated professional advice boundaries. The system cannot provide regulated professional advice, but it can help you prepare to engage the right professional.
whatWeCanStillMap: Adversarial challenge and minimum viable path

professionalBrief.purpose: This brief is designed to help you approach a regulated professional with structure.
whatToBring: This Living Decision Case reference and output
Evidence of constraints (financial statements, timelines, capacity data)
Any documentation referenced in the evidence graph
questionsToAsk: What are the regulatory requirements for any financial promotion or investment solicitation?

whatToDoNext: Prepare the documentation listed in the professional brief.
Engage a qualified professional for the regulated element.
Return to the system with the professional's input to update the case.

minimumViablePath.description: Establish who holds decision mandate before proceeding
minimumViablePath.rationale: Without clear authority, any decision is vulnerable to challenge

minimumViablePath.description: Verify: Cash position constrains available options
minimumViablePath.rationale: Critical constraints change the feasible set

whatMustNotBeDelayed: Establish who holds decision mandate before proceeding
Verify: Cash position constrains available options
qualityFailures: GENERIC_ADVICE: Output contains no specific, non-swappable insight
